subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One summoneth thee unto God. Great indeed is this Day. Blessed is the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم لله آنجناب را دعوت مینماید امروز روزیست عظیم نیکوست حال نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
